font_family.headings: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Open Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
font_family.body: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Open Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
font_family.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace

layout.container: container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl

buttons.primary: bg-[#1D5EBC] hover:bg-[#164B96] text-white font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-50 font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#1D5EBC] text-[#1D5EBC] hover:bg-[#1D5EBC] hover:text-white font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all

cards.product: group relative bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#1D5EBC]/30
cards.feature: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100 rounded-xl p-6 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md transition-all

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#1D5EBC] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

instructions_to_main_agent: USE THE PROVIDED IMAGE URLS. Do not use placeholders for products or hero images.
Implement the 'Technical Grid' layout: Dense, information-rich product cards with visible specs (Bar, L/min).
The sidebar must be sticky on desktop.
Use the color #1D5EBC for all primary actions and active states.
Ensure all text is in Russian as provided in the content_strategy.
The 'View Mode' (Grid/List/Compact) must be functional state that changes the layout of the product grid.
Use Lucide-React icons for all UI elements (shopping-cart, search, menu, phone, filter, grid, list).
Do not use gradients. Stick to solid white backgrounds and subtle gray borders for a professional B2B look.
For the 'Partners' section, use the generated placeholder URLs if actual logos are not available, but style them cleanly in a grayscale grid that lights up on hover.
universal_guidelines: Do not apply 'transition: all'. Use specific transitions.
Do not center align the app container.
Ensure high contrast for text (Slate 900 on White).
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Do not use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or modals.
